Relevance is determined by documents that clearly explain the eligibility criteria (e.g., minimum 130 days or 910 hours of work since last claim, 30% increase in allowance, or daily allowance ≤ €20), the procedural steps to apply through Pôle emploi, the 21-day reflection period, and the irreversible nature of the choice. Documents must distinguish the right of option from simple reloading of rights and clarify the financial trade-offs. Irrelevant documents discussing general unemployment rules, intermittent work, health insurance options, or Wikipedia-style overviews of Pôle emploi are not relevant.
